description: Create a proportional symbol map of world cities in gvSIG Desktop using the 'ne_110m_populated_places.shp' layer (located in /home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/) added to the 'countries_base.gvsproj' project or 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp' base. Represent the cities using graduated symbols based on the 'POP_MAX' field, with circle sizes ranging from 4 to 20. Save the project to /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/proportional_cities.gvsproj and export the map view as an image to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/proportional_cities.png.
